phrase: — Excuse me, do you know where the bathroom is? — Yes, at the back on the right

translations.es: — Perdona, ¿sabes dónde está el baño? — Sí, al fondo a la derecha
translations.fr: — Excusez-moi, savez-vous où sont les toilettes ? — Oui, au fond à droite
translations.it: — Scusi, sa dov'è il bagno? — Sì, in fondo a destra
translations.en: — Excuse me, do you know where the bathroom is? — Yes, at the back on the right

phrase: — Sorry, I'm a bit late — No worries, we just started

translations.es: — Disculpa, llego un poco tarde — No pasa nada, apenas empezamos
translations.fr: — Désolé, je suis un peu en retard — Pas de souci, on vient de commencer
translations.it: — Scusa, sono un po' in ritardo — Non preoccuparti, abbiamo appena iniziato
translations.en: — Sorry, I'm a bit late — No worries, we just started

phrase: — How much is this? — It's twenty euros

translations.es: — ¿Cuánto cuesta esto? — Son veinte euros
translations.fr: — Combien ça coûte ? — C'est vingt euros
translations.it: — Quanto costa questo? — Sono venti euro
translations.en: — How much is this? — It's twenty euros

phrase: — Do you recommend something? — Yes, this dish is very popular

translations.es: — ¿Me recomiendas algo? — Sí, este plato es muy popular
translations.fr: — Vous recommandez quelque chose ? — Oui, ce plat est très populaire
translations.it: — Mi consiglia qualcosa? — Sì, questo piatto è molto popolare
translations.en: — Do you recommend something? — Yes, this dish is very popular

phrase: — What are you looking for? — Something quick and cheap

translations.es: — ¿Qué estás buscando? — Algo rápido y barato
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu cherches ? — Quelque chose de rapide et pas cher
translations.it: — Cosa stai cercando? — Qualcosa di veloce ed economico
translations.en: — What are you looking for? — Something quick and cheap

phrase: — Can I help you? — Yes, I'm looking for this

translations.es: — ¿Te puedo ayudar? — Sí, estoy buscando esto
translations.fr: — Je peux vous aider ? — Oui, je cherche ceci
translations.it: — Posso aiutarla? — Sì, sto cercando questo
translations.en: — Can I help you? — Yes, I'm looking for this

phrase: — How do I get there? — Go straight then turn left

translations.es: — ¿Cómo llego ahí? — Sigue recto y luego gira a la izquierda
translations.fr: — Comment j'y vais ? — Allez tout droit puis tournez à gauche
translations.it: — Come ci arrivo? — Vada dritto e poi giri a sinistra
translations.en: — How do I get there? — Go straight then turn left

phrase: — Everything good with the order? — Yes, everything perfect

translations.es: — ¿Todo bien con el pedido? — Sí, todo perfecto
translations.fr: — Tout va bien avec la commande ? — Oui, tout est parfait
translations.it: — Tutto bene con l'ordine? — Sì, tutto perfetto
translations.en: — Everything good with the order? — Yes, everything perfect

phrase: — Cash or card? — Card

translations.es: — ¿Pagas en efectivo o tarjeta? — Con tarjeta
translations.fr: — Espèces ou carte ? — Par carte
translations.it: — Contanti o carta? — Con carta
translations.en: — Cash or card? — Card

phrase: — Do you need anything else? — No, that's all

translations.es: — ¿Necesitas algo más? — No, eso es todo
translations.fr: — Vous avez besoin d'autre chose ? — Non, c'est tout
translations.it: — Ha bisogno di altro? — No, è tutto
translations.en: — Do you need anything else? — No, that's all

phrase: — Is this taken? — No, you can sit

translations.es: — ¿Está ocupado? — No, puedes sentarte
translations.fr: — C'est pris ? — Non, vous pouvez vous asseoir
translations.it: — È occupato? — No, si può sedere
translations.en: — Is this taken? — No, you can sit

phrase: — How was the service? — Very good, thanks

translations.es: — ¿Qué tal el servicio? — Muy bien, gracias
translations.fr: — Comment était le service ? — Très bien, merci
translations.it: — Com'era il servizio? — Molto buono, grazie
translations.en: — How was the service? — Very good, thanks

phrase: — How long have you been here? — A couple of years

translations.es: — ¿Cuánto tiempo llevas aquí? — Un par de años
translations.fr: — Depuis combien de temps êtes-vous ici ? — Quelques années
translations.it: — Da quanto tempo sei qui? — Un paio d'anni
translations.en: — How long have you been here? — A couple of years

phrase: — Do you like living here? — Yes, quite a lot

translations.es: — ¿Te gusta vivir aquí? — Sí, bastante
translations.fr: — Tu aimes vivre ici ? — Oui, beaucoup
translations.it: — Ti piace vivere qui? — Sì, parecchio
translations.en: — Do you like living here? — Yes, quite a lot

phrase: — What do you recommend doing? — Depends on what you like

translations.es: — ¿Qué recomiendas hacer? — Depende de lo que te guste
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu recommandes de faire ? — Ça dépend de ce que tu aimes
translations.it: — Cosa consigli di fare? — Dipende da cosa ti piace
translations.en: — What do you recommend doing? — Depends on what you like

phrase: — Do you come often? — Yes, pretty often

translations.es: — ¿Vienes seguido? — Sí, bastante seguido
translations.fr: — Tu viens souvent ? — Oui, assez souvent
translations.it: — Vieni spesso? — Sì, abbastanza spesso
translations.en: — Do you come often? — Yes, pretty often

phrase: — Can I ask you something? — Of course, tell me

translations.es: — ¿Te puedo hacer una pregunta? — Claro, dime
translations.fr: — Je peux te poser une question ? — Bien sûr, dis-moi
translations.it: — Posso chiederti una cosa? — Certo, dimmi
translations.en: — Can I ask you something? — Of course, tell me

phrase: — What do you think of this? — It's pretty good

translations.es: — ¿Qué te parece esto? — Está bastante bien
translations.fr: — Qu'est-ce que tu en penses ? — C'est plutôt bien
translations.it: — Cosa ne pensi? — È piuttosto buono
translations.en: — What do you think of this? — It's pretty good

phrase: — Are you ready? — Yes, whenever you are

translations.es: — ¿Estás listo? — Sí, cuando quieras
translations.fr: — Tu es prêt ? — Oui, quand tu veux
translations.it: — Sei pronto? — Sì, quando vuoi
translations.en: — Are you ready? — Yes, whenever you are

phrase: — Let's go then — Let's do it

translations.es: — Vamos entonces — Dale
translations.fr: — Allons-y alors — C'est parti
translations.it: — Andiamo allora — Facciamolo
translations.en: — Let's go then — Let's do it
